name: Fakechat
description: Localhost iMessage-style web chat for Claude Code — test surface with file upload and edits. No tokens, no access control.
longDescription: Lightweight MCP-based chat UI for testing Claude Code's channel contract locally. Provides **2 tools**: `reply` (text + file attachments up to 50MB) and `edit_message`. Runs a web server on `localhost:8787` (port configurable via `FAKECHAT_PORT`). Incoming attachments land in `~/.claude/channels/fakechat/inbox/`; outgoing files are served via HTTP from an `outbox/` directory. No persistent history, no access control, no search — each browser reload starts a fresh session. Strictly a development utility for testing channel integrations.
